detectors.description:
Conductor.transfer(address) (Conductor.sol#39-55) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- adr.transfer(this.balance) (Conductor.sol#51)
detectors.markdown:
[Conductor.transfer(address)](Conductor.sol#L39-L55) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [adr.transfer(this.balance)](Conductor.sol#L51)

detectors.description:
Conductor.transfer(address) (Conductor.sol#39-55) uses delegatecall to a input-controlled function id
	- DataBase.delegatecall(bytes4(sha3()(AddToDB(address))),msg.sender) (Conductor.sol#49)

detectors.description:

detectors.description:
Conductor.Set(address,uint256).dataBase (Conductor.sol#21) lacks a zero-check on :
		- DataBase = dataBase (Conductor.sol#29)

Conductor.transfer(address).adr (Conductor.sol#39) lacks a zero-check on :
		- adr.transfer(this.balance) (Conductor.sol#51)

Deprecated standard detected DataBase.delegatecall(bytes4(sha3()(AddToDB(address))),msg.sender) (Conductor.sol#49):
	- Usage of "sha3()" should be replaced with "keccak256()"
detectors.markdown:
Deprecated standard detected [DataBase.delegatecall(bytes4(sha3()(AddToDB(address))),msg.sender)](Conductor.sol#L49):
	- Usage of "sha3()" should be replaced with "keccak256()"

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.18 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.18 (Conductor.sol#1)
